title: Roomio Save Envelope (Persistence & Sharing)
description: Agent C's contract for feature 2 (Persistence & Sharing). ONE design = one envelope. It composes the FULL scene so a saved design is the whole dwelling, not a single room: scene.house is Agent C's House (which already embeds Agent A's RoomDesign verbatim at rooms[].interior), and scene.lighting is Agent E's LightingState (or null => E renders its defaults). This is exactly the content of a `.roomio` export file. VERSIONED + forward-compatible: a bare RoomDesign (today's single-room save), a bare House, or Agent A's localStorage design-map all migrate forward into this shape (see persistence/src/envelope/migrate.ts). Unknown fields are preserved on round-trip; consumers ignore what they don't recognize. Each agent confirms its slice round-trips: A => scene.house.rooms[].interior, C => scene.house, E => scene.lighting. Owned by Agent C; Agent D merges.

schema_version.description: Envelope format version (string). Bumped only on a breaking shape change; the loader migrates older shapes forward.

design_id.description: Stable unique id for this design.

name.description: User-facing name. New designs start 'Untitled room' (never blocked on a name dialog); renamed inline later.

updatedAt.description: Epoch ms of the last successful save (drives 'last-edited' + sort).

rev.description: Monotonic save revision; increments on every successful save. Drives version history + optimistic-concurrency checks.

thumbnail.description: Auto-generated PNG data-URL snapshot of the scene, so the My Designs grid always looks current. null until first thumbnail is captured.

scene.description: The composed scene — every agent's slice in one place.

house.description: Agent C's House (shared/house_schema.json v1.0). Embeds Agent A's RoomDesign at rooms[].interior — so 'interiors' are NOT a sibling key; they live inside the house. A single-room design is a one-room house with empty connectors.

lighting.description: Agent E's LightingState (shared/lighting_schema.json v1.0), keyed by room_id. null => Agent E renders built-in defaults (never a dark box). Persistence treats this as an OPAQUE pass-through: it stores what E hands it and returns it byte-for-byte.

share.description: Sharing state. Designed against the cardinal sin: a view link must NEVER expose the editor or other designs. Defaults to the SAFE option.

access.description: What a link grants. 'private' = not shared (initial). First share defaults to 'view'. 'edit' is only meaningful once a backend exists.

view_link_id.description: Opaque token for the view-only SHOWCASE link — opens a read-only walkthrough of THIS design only (reuses Agent B's flythrough), never the editor/library/other designs.

edit_link_id.description: Opaque token for an edit link. null in the local-first tier (no backend to resolve it).

history.description: Optional lightweight restore points (version-history stretch). Capped (oldest dropped first). Each holds a full scene copy so a bad edit can be rolled back.

label.description: Optional name for a manual checkpoint.

scene.description: Full SceneEnvelope snapshot at this rev.
